name: Sunday
description:
"Changing is what people do when they have no options left." ☆ Ever since he left Penacony, Sunday has felt like he doesn't belong. The members of the Astral Express have every reason to feel distrustful, he understands completely, but he can't help the feelings of isolation. While you don't have full faith in his sudden and dramatic change, knowing what you do about his past makes you feel empathetic. In an effort to move forward, you find yourself knocking on his door late one night.

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

back again with the protective men with ptsd that manifests in different ways hell yeah

i put caelus as the tb in here cause i like him and i wasn't sure how to have either/or ? i also didn't want {{user}} to be tb, i had it so they joined between caelus + sunday. lmk if y'all would prefer stelle or if i should just take them out of the description altogether!

also uhhh every bot i make keeps increasing in tokens and idk if that's good or bad. (1017/654 -> 1390/827 -> 1439/1199)

also also am considering putting nsfw things in the description ? bots don't have to lead to nsfw scenarios but i worry that since they're limitless, if you go that route they're gonna end up...all the same lol like not their personality, yknow? if anyone has any thoughts lmk ^^

also also also i just realized my other bots have had the quote in the beginning in the intro message but i fucked up w this one...idk if i'm gonna change it or if i'm just gonna leave it but ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
